title: Successful account creation with valid mandatory fields
description: Verify that a customer can successfully create a new account when all mandatory fields are provided with valid data, and the system stores the information and confirms creation.
related_requirements: FR1: The system shall allow a customer to create a new account.
FR2: The system shall collect and store customer information required for account creation.

title: Account creation fails when mandatory fields are missing
description: Verify that the system rejects account creation when one or more mandatory fields are not provided, and does not create the account.
related_requirements: FR1: The system shall allow a customer to create a new account.
V1: All mandatory fields must be provided and valid before account creation.

title: Account creation fails with invalid email format
description: Verify that the system rejects account creation when the provided email address does not conform to a valid email format (e.g., missing '@', missing domain, invalid characters).
related_requirements: V2: Email address format must be valid.

title: Account creation fails with weak password not meeting complexity requirements
description: Verify that the system rejects account creation when the password does not meet the defined complexity requirements (e.g., insufficient length, missing required character types).
related_requirements: V3: Password must meet complexity requirements (e.g., length, character types).

title: Account creation fails when email or username already exists
description: Verify that the system prevents creation of a duplicate account by rejecting a registration attempt where the email or username already exists in the system.
related_requirements: BR1: Each customer account must be uniquely identifiable (e.g., by email or username).
V4: Username or email must not already exist in the system.

title: Account creation with password at minimum length boundary
description: Verify that the system accepts account creation when the password is exactly at the minimum required length (assuming a minimum length is part of complexity requirements).
related_requirements: V3: Password must meet complexity requirements (e.g., length, character types).

title: Account creation with password at maximum length boundary
description: Verify that the system accepts account creation when the password is exactly at the maximum allowed length (assuming a maximum length is defined).
related_requirements: V3: Password must meet complexity requirements (e.g., length, character types).

title: Account creation fails with password exceeding maximum length
description: Verify that the system rejects account creation when the password exceeds the maximum allowed length (assuming a maximum length is defined).
related_requirements: V3: Password must meet complexity requirements (e.g., length, character types).

title: Account creation fails with password below minimum length
description: Verify that the system rejects account creation when the password is shorter than the minimum required length (assuming a minimum length is part of complexity requirements).
related_requirements: V3: Password must meet complexity requirements (e.g., length, character types).

title: Account creation with identity or contact verification step (if applicable)
description: Verify that if account creation requires verification of customer identity or contact information, the system initiates the verification process (e.g., sends a verification email) and does not fully activate the account until verification is completed.
related_requirements: BR2: Account creation may require verification of customer identity or contact information.
